name: Nebula
description: A polished first-party filesystem child theme (Phase-3 dogfood). Overrides the documented ThemeApi token contract — a distinct AA-safe violet accent (AccentPalette) plus semantic --novfora-* tokens — and the footer branding, entirely through the Blade view-override API with zero core edits. Coexists with the module slot system and the admin layout/region configurator.
